chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ مَنْ عَفَّ عَنْ حَرَمِ النَّاسِ عُفَّ عَنْ حَرَمِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 185 – The one restrains from the sanctity of the people, his sanctity would be restrained from

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/404)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/404)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) بَرُّوا آبَاءَكُمْ يَبَرَّكُمْ أَبْنَاؤُكُمْ وَ عِفُّوا عَنْ نِسَاءِ النَّاسِ تَعِفَّ نِسَاؤُكُمْ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ali Bin Ribat, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Be good to your father, your sons would be good with you, and restrain (adultery) from the women of the people, your womenfolk will restrain’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Ali ibn Ribat from ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Be kind to your parents, your children will be kind to you, maintain chastity toward people’s women; your women will maintain chastity.’”
